ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We hope you are enjoying the benefits of our SaaS platform. As part of our annual renewal process, we would like to inform you that your subscription for the Premium Plan is set to expire on 30th April 2026. To ensure uninterrupted access, please review and confirm your subscription details at your earliest convenience.

Click here: <URL>

If you have any questions or require assistance, feel free to contact our support team at support@company.com.

Thank you for choosing our services.

Best regards,
[Company] Customer Success Team

spam.subject: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notification – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [User Name],

This is an automated notification from the Microsoft 365 Security Team. Your password is scheduled to expire in 48 hours. To avoid any disruption to your account, you must update your password immediately.
